codeActions.title: Add missing decorator import
codeActions.description: Adds the missing import statement for NestJS decorators like @Controller, @Injectable, @Get, @Post, etc. from @nestjs/common

codeActions.title: Generate constructor injection
codeActions.description: Generates a constructor with dependency injection for the specified service or repository

codeActions.title: Extract method to service
codeActions.description: Extracts the selected method logic from a controller into a service class

codeActions.title: Add @Injectable() decorator
codeActions.description: Adds the @Injectable() decorator to a class that needs to be managed by the NestJS IoC container

codeActions.title: Convert to async method
codeActions.description: Converts a synchronous route handler method to an async method with Promise return type

codeActions.title: Add ValidationPipe to method
codeActions.description: Adds @UsePipes(new ValidationPipe()) decorator to the route handler for request validation

codeActions.title: Wrap in try-catch with HttpException
codeActions.description: Wraps the selected code in a try-catch block that throws an appropriate HttpException on error

codeActions.title: Add @ApiProperty() to DTO fields
codeActions.description: Adds @ApiProperty() decorator from @nestjs/swagger to all properties in a DTO class for Swagger documentation

codeActions.title: Generate CRUD endpoints
codeActions.description: Generates a complete set of CRUD route handlers (GET, POST, PUT, DELETE) in the controller

codeActions.title: Add @UseGuards(AuthGuard)
codeActions.description: Adds @UseGuards(AuthGuard('jwt')) decorator to protect the route with JWT authentication

codeActions.title: Add @UseInterceptors(ClassSerializerInterceptor)
codeActions.description: Adds ClassSerializerInterceptor to the controller or method for response serialization

codeActions.title: Add Swagger decorators to endpoint
codeActions.description: Adds @ApiOperation, @ApiResponse, and other Swagger decorators to document the endpoint

codeActions.title: Convert to custom provider
codeActions.description: Converts a simple class provider to a custom provider with useFactory, useValue, or useClass syntax

codeActions.title: Add module imports
codeActions.description: Adds missing NestJS module imports (ConfigModule, TypeOrmModule, etc.) to the module's imports array

codeActions.title: Organize imports
codeActions.description: Organizes and sorts import statements, grouping @nestjs/* imports together

codeActions.title: Fix all auto-fixable issues
codeActions.description: Applies all available auto-fixes including missing imports, decorators, and formatting
